name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: "

assignees: ""
---

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

**Scope**
What parts of the project does this task affect? (e.g. codebase, documentation, dependencies)

**Impact**
What is the expected impact of completing this task? (e.g. improved performance, easier maintenance)

**Additional Context**
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
